positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a forest clearing at dawn. The main subject is a group of friendly woodland creatures (e.g., smiling fox, curious owl, leaping bunny) gathered around a glowing, abstract lantern centerpiece. The style is clean, geometric vector art mixed with watercolor textures, giving it a hand-painted, storybook feel. The composition is central and balanced, designed for apparel. Use a limited color palette: deep emerald greens, soft gold, muted sky blue, and pops of burnt orange. Strong, directional lighting coming from the lantern, creating deep, graphic shadows. The overall mood is cozy, magical, and positive. High contrast, crisp edges, perfect for screen printing.
